content:
I don't have the ability to access external URLs or browse the internet, so I cannot retrieve the content from the CFA Institute link you've provided.

However, if you could paste the article text directly into our conversation, I would be happy to summarize it into 3 clear bullet points focused on the ESG-related content.

Alternatively, if you can share the key details or topic of the article, I can help you formulate a summary based on that information.
